title: Magnificent Gameplay
description: Improves the performance of Minecraft with fun tweaks and addons.
body:
![Magnificent Gameplay Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e38f2e448c3590447016f6ccaa9274a840590e2.png) ***"The Antidote for Exploding Computers"***
___
Hello there! My name is GraysBlock, and this is my custom modpack I've created for whenever I play Minecraft. This modpack contains several mods that not only help make the game run faster and smoother than before, but also includes helpful QoL mods and ones that substitute OptiFine/MCPatcher features.


Here's a list of most of the mods that are included in this modpack:
![Performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09eb47417a5872369091ba82be80a2096c26b49e_0.webp) **Performance**
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) - Increases performance when generating chunks. - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) & [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer) - Reduces FPS/CPU usage when outside Minecraft. - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Converts some block entities into baked models for increased FPS. - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Stops rendering entities you can't see. - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Creates optimizations to reduce memory usage. - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Improves rendering performance for several aspects of gameplay. - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - Improves overall performance and patches bugs. - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Rewrites the rendering engine to be more optimized and run smoother.
![Quality of Life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9291a9318ada088c4600281518d976f55759568_0.webp) **Quality of Life**
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Provides information about hunger and saturation. - [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - Makes the F3 menu easier to view and customize. - [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) - Provides many features such as a friend list, cosmetics, and hosting your Singleplayer worlds. - [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) - Lets you record and edit gameplay footage, similar to ReplayMod. - [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) - Generates a blueprint of builds you've saved to easily recreate them. - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Creates a menu where you can view all installed mods and edit configuration files (if supported). - [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Massively increases the amount of messages saved from chat. - [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - Allows for more fluent mouse movements in GUIs. - [Music Delay Remover](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-music) - Removes the delay between music tracks. - [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Removes Minecraft's chat report system and disables telemetry data. - [Simple Discord RPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-discord-rpc) - Displays your Minecraft activity to Discord. - [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - Adds voice chat to Minecraft. - [Sit!](https://modrinth.com/mod/sit!) - Lets you sit on slab, stairs, carpets, and configurable blocks. - [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) - Provides creative tools to easily create builds.
![OptiFine Supplements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88a819e1f83f3c62aa6e6fa54d9d21d96e139d5c_0.webp) **OptiFine Supplements**
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Adds support for custom item models via resource packs. - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Adds support for connected textures. - [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) - Lets you adjust the colors of the loading screen. - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Implements support for shader packs. - [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) - Adds support for modifying originally hardcoded colors. - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - Adds a keybind for a configurable zoom feature. - [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Adds support for modifying entity models and textures via resource packs.
![Support Me!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b6f375efd919d2666c857a84d2340eb09f7112f_0.webp) **Support Me!** I don't actively use any main social media accounts nor do I own an account for donations, but if you want to support me you can always check out my YouTube channel. I like to make content on Minecraft and other games I enjoy, and sometimes stream games I'm playing with my friends. There's also my Planet Minecraft page, where I've released two popular resource packs; "Better Trims" and "Painter's Eye". If any of that interests you, then check out the links below!

[![YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ee22d607f7b1cd3b1d9a9a45597b4ae885038c1.png)](https://www.youtube.com/c/GraysBlock) [![Planet Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/643ecd55c2523f94adaba4ab786d099f5934948f.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/graysblock/)
